steps.title: Count total vertices and favorable outcomes
steps.content: A 14-sided polygon has 14 vertices, each labeled with a different letter from A through N. When we select one vertex at random, there are 14 equally likely outcomes. Exactly one of these vertices is labeled with the letter D.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
The number of favorable outcomes is 1 (the vertex labeled D). The total number of equally likely outcomes is 14 (all the vertices).

$$P = \frac{1}{14} \approx 0.0714$$
